mapper.update: update policy_general_rule rule set rule.status = 0 where rule.status in (1, 2) and rule.id in (select distinct r.general_rule_id from policy_general_rule_publish r where r.deleted = 0 and JSON_CONTAINS(r.reference_data -> '$.conditionIds', JSON_ARRAY(#{conditionId})));
mapper.select: update policy_rule_set rule set rule.status = 0 where rule.status in (1, 2) and rule.id in (select distinct r.rule_set_id from policy_rule_set_publish r where r.deleted = 0 and JSON_CONTAINS(r.reference_data -> '$.conditionIds', JSON_ARRAY(#{conditionId})));
